themes.reasoning_notes: Artifact that only converts itself into life gain; no payoff or drain text, so it mainly supports lifegain strategies.
It is a standalone artifact permanent, but its gameplay relevance is much more about gaining life than artifact synergy.
Its only meaningful effect is sacrificing to gain 4 or 8 life, making it a clean lifegain enabler with no separate payoff text.
It is an artifact permanent, but the card does not reference artifacts or reward artifact-centric play beyond existing as one.
